gate0.source_grade_rationale: Australian Financial Review is a primary financial newspaper explicitly listed on the approved sources list; not a secondary aggregator.

materiality_math: Base 72 (A$300m M&A, primary issuer, operations-changing asset sale) + novelty 13 (0.85 × 15) − penalties 0 (new_event, no duplicate) + overrides 0 = 85/100
routing_reason: Materiality 85 clears the 70-point PROMOTE threshold. A$300m asset sale by an ASX-listed gold miner is a direct capital-structure and production-profile change with high novelty (first appearance in ledger).

sources.claim_supported: Forrestania acquires Edna May gold mine from Ramelius Resources for A$300 million [AFR, 2026-06-28]
